summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Projetenne MVP. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified for all major flows: login, dashboard, portfolio, project detail, resources, governance, logout.

ui_bugs.issue: Left panel shows '3 Instances gouvernance' but DB has 5 governance instances — static/hardcoded count mismatch

integration_issues.issue: Testing script could not reliably target expand button — generic selectors matched logout button instead. Governance page loaded but expand wasn't confirmed via automation. Manual review recommended.

action_items: LOW: Fix governance count on login page left panel (shows 3, should show 5 from DB)
Consider adding data-testid attributes to governance expand buttons for better testability
critical_code_review_comments: JWT_SECRET has a fallback default in code (line 19) — should fail fast if not set in env
No rate limiting on /api/auth/login — brute force possible
READ_ONLY role can still call POST /api/projects endpoint structure exists but returns 403; consistent behavior

success_rate.frontend: 90% (all major flows working; governance expand not confirmed via automation)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created — existing MongoDB data used
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs pass. Frontend: Login, Dashboard (8 projects, 17M€ budget, bar+pie charts), Portfolio (8 rows, search+filter working), Project Detail (/projects/:id with budget+milestones), Resources (10 rows), and Governance page all verified. Logout works. Minor: login page static stats show 3 governance instances instead of 5 from DB. Governance accordion expand buttons need data-testid for proper automation.
